paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.12 as of 2026-07-20, with a 1.16 percent increase from the prior close and a 31.77 percent decrease over the last 20 sessions. There have been no new news articles in the last 24 hours.

Recent news articles have discussed the company's sharp selloff, with retail traders remaining bullish on the stock despite the departure of the CEO and a director. The director, Miles Everson, cited governance concerns as the reason for his resignation. The company has also completed a $375 million offering of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031.

There have been several recent SEC filings, including an 8-K form disclosing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031 and the resignation of director Miles Everson. There has been one Form 4 filing and no Form 144 filings.
